element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns controls while climbing out of teleportation pond; immediate environmental hazards present
Effective only against small creatures; player quickly learns limitations and vulnerability
Player must avoid dangerous indigenous animals; teaches one-hit-death consequence system

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Pond sequence and subsequent area traversal
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Swimming sequences with oxygen mechanics; platforming across hazardous terrain
Situation-specific actions required; example given: rocking cage back and forth
Transforms player from defenseless to armed; introduces three-mode weapon system
Basic offensive capability against armed enemies
Defensive capability; blocks enemy projectiles; mirrors enemy behavior
Breaks through force fields and destructible walls; highest damage capability
Alien companion travels with player; both remain invulnerable together until final sequence
Both Lester and Buddy must be protected; either taking damage ends game
Large environmental hazards; requires platforming precision and hazard avoidance
Vertical progression with escalating enemy encounters and hazards
Foundational mechanic: projectile contact, animal contact, or environmental hazard immediately ends game

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Oscillating tension with cinematic moments punctuating action sequences; checkpoint system allows exploration without resource depletion anxiety; one-hit-death mechanic creates moment-to-moment high tension during active gameplay phases

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; teaches movement and evasion with small creatures and environmental hazards; unarmed vulnerability creates tension
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; introduces weapon acquisition and dual-character management; prison complex and cave system navigation increase spatial complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: High; tower climbing with armed enemies using equivalent weapon capabilities (force fields, charged shots); final boss encounter with wounding mechanic introduces narrative stakes
notable_spikes: Prison escape sequence - first combat against armed humanoids
Cave system navigation - tight platforming with hazards
Tower climb - sustained enemy pressure and vertical navigation
Final encounter - alien adversary wounds Lester, introducing damage consequence (unique instance)

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Linear narrative progression through environment types
notable_level_patterns.description: Game progresses through distinct environmental zones (barren planet → prison complex → cave system → tower) each with unique hazard and enemy types; movement from one thematic space to next marks gameplay progression and difficulty scaling
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Pond escape (introduction) → Prison complex (armed enemies) → Caves (environmental hazards) → Tower (vertical challenge)

notable_level_patterns.description: Checkpoints placed at natural story beats and between major challenge sections, allowing infinite retry of dangerous passages without progress loss; creates safe pockets between tension episodes
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All sequences, with implicit checkpoints between major environments

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemies possess identical laser pistol modes as player (standard fire, force field, charged shot); player must learn enemy behavior patterns to overcome tactical disadvantage and adapt weapon use
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-game onwards; escalates through prison complex and tower

notable_level_patterns.description: Real-time cutscenes and cinematics interrupt action sequences to advance narrative, provide context, and offer tension relief; minimal text/interface maintains immersion and forces environmental reading
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Opening laboratory sequence; mid-game capture/escape scenes; final tower escape sequence

notable_level_patterns.description: After Buddy acquisition, player must protect two characters simultaneously; both remain invulnerable until final sequence, creating escort-mission style tension in dangerous areas
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Prison escape onwards; cave system; tower climb
